# mpshock

> Provides a curated multi-country collection of monetary policy shock and stance series from the empirical macroeconomics literature, bundled as tidy data frames with provenance metadata. Install with `install.packages("mpshock")`.

Full API reference (for agents): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/charlescoverdale/mpshock/main/llms-full.txt

Version: 0.1.1. License: MIT.

## Functions

- [`mp_align()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/mpshock/reference/mp_align.html): Align a shock series to a target data frame by date
- [`mp_cumulate()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/mpshock/reference/mp_cumulate.html): Cumulate a shock series
- [`mp_list()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/mpshock/reference/mp_list.html): List available monetary policy shock series
- [`mp_shock()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/mpshock/reference/mp_shock.html): Load a monetary policy shock series
- [`mp_source()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/mpshock/reference/mp_source.html): Citation and provenance for a shock series
- [`mp_to_quarterly()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/mpshock/reference/mp_to_quarterly.html): Aggregate a monthly shock series to quarterly frequency

## Documentation

- [Full reference](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/mpshock/reference/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/charlescoverdale/mpshock)
- [CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=mpshock)
